title: The Pomander Bracelet.
content:
To me my Julia lately sent
    A bracelet richly redolent:
    The beads I kissed, but most lov'd her
    That did perfume the pomander.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Pomander Bracelet.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
